crystals_down.title: Destroy all End Crystals on the obsidian pillars before engaging the dragon

dragon_egg.title: Claim the Dragon Egg from the fountain (it only spawns once per world)

subtitle.text: The dragon is the last guardian of a seal that has already been broken. It fights anyway.

description: The Ender Dragon has been waiting here since the civilization that locked the portal
placed it as a final deterrent.
It is not malicious. It is an ancient mechanism.
It fights because it was built to fight.
Defeating it does not feel like a victory so much as completing a process.
The Dragon Egg appears once. It is a trophy and a crafting ingredient.
In Ch14, End's Delight uses the Dragon Egg for the Dragon Egg Research mechanic.
Do not use it yet unless you know what you're doing.
After the dragon falls, the exit gateway opens.
